scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like an audio guide with your ticket?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 티켓과 함께 오디오 가이드 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, do you have one in Korean?
How much is the audio guide?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like me to take your picture?

choices.text: Yes, please! Just press this button.
Thank you! Could you take a few?

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: Where's the best spot for photos?
Where can I get the best view?
Take me to a secret place.

scenes.npcDialog: The observation deck closes at 10 PM. Enjoy the view!

choices.text: Great! Is sunset time around 7 today?
Thank you! Can I bring food up there?
I want to stay all night.

scenes.npcDialog: The boat tour is about 1 hour. Would you like window seats?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 보트 투어는 약 1시간이에요. 창가 좌석 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, please. Can we sit on the upper deck?
Are there any commentary in English?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for souvenirs? These are our bestsellers.

choices.text: Do you have anything under 20 euros?
Souvenirs are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you plan your day?

choices.text: Do you have a city map?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like any information materials?

choices.text: Do you have a brochure in Korean?
Can I get a map of the area?
Paper is bad for the environment.

scenes.npcDialog: Hop-on hop-off bus? You can get off at any of our 20 stops.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 홉온홉오프 버스요? 20개 정류장 어디서든 내릴 수 있어요.

choices.text: Which stop is closest to the main square?
How often does the bus come?

scenes.npcDialog: Our night tour shows you the city all lit up. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 야경 투어로 조명이 켜진 도시를 보여드려요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! What time does it start?
That sounds beautiful. How long is it?

scenes.npcDialog: This building dates back to the 17th century.

choices.text: What was it used for back then?
I don't care about old stuff.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any questions about your visit?

choices.text: What time do you close today?
Is the museum open on weekends?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you'd like to know?

choices.text: Can I leave and come back later?
Is re-entry allowed with this ticket?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you traveling together? Need a group photo?

choices.text: Yes! Could you take one of all of us?
That would be great, thank you!

scenes.npcDialog: How many days are you staying?

choices.text: Can you recommend a walking route?
Just tell me the best thing.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you prepared for the tour?

choices.text: Will we be outside? Should I bring a jacket?
What kind of shoes should I wear?

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?
Would you like to take a break?

choices.text: Where can I sit and rest?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a good place to eat nearby?

choices.text: Can you recommend a local favorite?
I only eat at my hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: Nice day to relax in the park, isn't it?

choices.text: It really is! Is it okay to sit on the grass?
Beautiful! Are there any cafes nearby?
I came here to shop, not relax.

scenes.npcDialog: First time staying at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes! Is it usually lively here?
What's the vibe like at night?

scenes.npcDialog: Where are you heading next?

choices.text: I'm thinking about Paris. Any tips?
Not sure yet. What do you recommend?

scenes.npcDialog: Need a ride? Where are you going?

choices.text: I'm trying to get to the next town. Can you help?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Make yourself at home. Here's your couch.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영해요! 편하게 있어요. 여기가 당신 자리예요.

choices.text: Thank you so much for hosting me!
This is so kind of you. Can I help with anything?

scenes.npcDialog: You're not from around here, are you? Where are you from?

choices.text: I'm from Korea! Is this your hometown?
I'm traveling through. What's this area like?
Why do you want to know?

scenes.npcDialog: There's a free concert tonight at the square!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 밤 광장에서 무료 콘서트 있어요!

choices.text: That sounds great! What time does it start?

scenes.npcDialog: Enjoying the street performance?

choices.text: It's amazing! Should I tip them?

scenes.npcDialog: What'll it be? We have local craft beer on tap.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뭘로 드릴까요? 지역 수제 맥주 있어요.

choices.text: I'll try the local beer. What do you recommend?

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something off the beaten path?

choices.text: Yes! Where do locals hang out?
I only go to famous places.
Hidden places are hidden for a reason.

scenes.npcDialog: How long are you planning to stay?

choices.text: Maybe a week. Do you offer any discounts for longer stays?

scenes.npcDialog: Need to do some laundry?

choices.text: How much does a load cost?

scenes.npcDialog: Where are you headed next?

choices.text: What's the cheapest way to get to Berlin?
When's the next bus to Prague?
Just tell me where to go.

scenes.npcDialog: Passport please. Where are you traveling from?

choices.text: I'm traveling from the Netherlands. Here's my passport.
Why do you need my passport?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'd like to ask about extending my visa.
What documents do I need for a visa extension?

scenes.npcDialog: Need a local SIM card?

choices.text: How much data do I get for 10 euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Forgot something?

choices.text: Do you have a charger I could borrow?
Is there a universal adapter at reception?
My phone died and it's your fault.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have travel insurance?

choices.text: Not yet. What coverage do you offer?
Nothing bad will happen to me.

scenes.npcDialog: Heading out for the night?

choices.text: Yes. Are there any areas I should avoid?
Is it safe to walk around at night?

scenes.npcDialog: You picked a great time to visit! The festival is this weekend!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좋은 때 오셨네요! 이번 주말에 축제예요!

choices.text: That's lucky! Where does it take place?
I don't care about local culture.

scenes.npcDialog: Checking out? Need to store your bags?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick them up this evening before my bus.
How late can I pick up my bags?
I don't trust you with my bags.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the business center. How can I assist you?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스센터에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 어떻게 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I need to print some documents.
Is there a computer I can use?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a meeting room?

choices.text: Yes, for 6 people tomorrow at 2 PM.
What equipment is included in the room?

scenes.npcDialog: The printer is right there. Need help?

choices.text: Can you help me make 10 copies?

scenes.npcDialog: Will you need any interpretation services?

choices.text: Yes, do you have a Korean interpreter?

scenes.npcDialog: Thank you for coming. Shall we get started?

choices.text: Thank you for having us. Yes, let's begin.
It's a pleasure to be here. Please, go ahead.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's my business card.

choices.text: Thank you. Here's mine as well.
I appreciate it. Let me give you mine.

scenes.npcDialog: Your client has arrived. Shall I bring the menus?

choices.text: Yes, please. And a bottle of wine for the table.
Thank you. We'll order in a few minutes.
I'm not paying for this meal.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to toast to the partnership?
Looking for a corporate gift?

choices.text: Yes, something elegant for our client.
What do you recommend for business partners?
Gifts are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like pressing service for your suit?

choices.text: Yes, please. I need it by 7 AM tomorrow.
How long does express pressing take?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 35 euros.

choices.text: Can I get a receipt, please? For my expense report.
I need a proper receipt with the company name.

scenes.npcDialog: How would you like to pay?

choices.text: I'll pay with my corporate credit card.
Send the bill to my boss.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a receipt?

choices.text: Yes, and can I get a proper invoice for my company?
I need an invoice with VAT details.

scenes.npcDialog: I see you have a reservation for tonight.

choices.text: Yes, is early check-in possible? I have a meeting at 2.
I just landed. Can I get my room now?

scenes.npcDialog: Check-out is normally at 11 AM.

choices.text: Is late checkout possible? My flight is at 8 PM.
Could I extend until 3 PM? I have meetings until noon.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the business lounge. How long until your flight?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 비행기까지 얼마나 남았어요?

choices.text: About 2 hours. Is there a quiet area to work?
I have some time. Where can I take a call privately?

scenes.npcDialog: Need any help with printing?

choices.text: I need to print a contract. Can you help format it?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to send something?

choices.text: Yes, I need to courier these documents urgently.
What's the fastest shipping option to Korea?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need laundry service?

choices.text: I need my shirt cleaned urgently. Is same-day possible?
I have a meeting in 4 hours. Can you clean this quickly?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with your booking?

choices.text: I need to change my flight to tomorrow. Is that possible?
My meeting got extended. Can I fly out a day later?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Are you here to register for our English program?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to enroll in the intermediate course.
What courses do you offer for beginners?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you prefer morning or afternoon classes?

choices.text: Morning classes would be better for me.
What time do afternoon classes start?
I don't want to wake up early.

scenes.npcDialog: Let me explain our house rules. Quiet time starts at 10 PM.

choices.text: I understand. What about having friends over?

scenes.npcDialog: How was your first day at school?

choices.text: It was great! The teachers are really nice.
A bit nervous, but I think I'll enjoy it.
I don't want to talk about it.

scenes.npcDialog: Let me show you around. Here's the cafeteria.

choices.text: Great! Is there a library too?
Where can I find the computer lab?

scenes.npcDialog: Need any help finding study materials?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 학습 자료 찾는 거 도움 필요하세요?

choices.text: Yes, where are the English grammar books?
How long can I borrow books for?

scenes.npcDialog: We need to take your photo for the student ID.

choices.text: Okay, when will the card be ready?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you a student? We offer 50% off.

choices.text: That's great! One student ticket please.

scenes.npcDialog: We have a study group meeting after class. Want to join?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 수업 후에 스터디 그룹 모임 있어요. 참가하실래요?

choices.text: Yes! What topic are you studying?
Sounds great! What time does it start?

scenes.npcDialog: The homework is due on Friday. Any questions?

choices.text: Should we work in groups or individually?
Can I email it or should I print it?

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you today?

choices.text: I'm having trouble with pronunciation. Any tips?
Could you recommend some extra exercises?

scenes.npcDialog: How are you finding your current class level?

choices.text: It's a bit easy. Can I move to a higher level?
I think I need a slower-paced class.

scenes.npcDialog: Congratulations on completing the course! Would you like your certificate?

choices.text: Yes, please! Can I get an official one with a stamp?
Thank you! Will it show my final grade?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you here to open an account?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student here. What documents do I need?
I need an account for my study abroad expenses.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for a phone plan?

choices.text: Yes, I'm here for 6 months. What are my options?
Do you have any student plans?

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with something?

choices.text: Are you hiring? I'm a student looking for part-time work.
I saw your job posting. Is the position still open?
I don't really want to work.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a student monthly pass?
Welcome to the dormitory. Here's your room key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 기숙사에 오신 것을 환영해요. 방 열쇠예요.

choices.text: Thank you! Where's the common room?

scenes.npcDialog: We're organizing a cultural trip this weekend. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 이번 주말에 문화 여행이 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Sounds fun! How do I sign up?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you interested in language exchange?

choices.text: Yes! I can teach Korean if someone helps me with English.
That sounds great! How does it work?
